title: Student Life
content:
Student Life

At Istanbul 29 Mayıs University, students enjoy a colorful social and cultural atmosphere. On both campuses, academic, social and cultural events go hand in hand. While academic events provide students with the opportunity to increase their knowledge in their fields, social and cultural events provide them with versatile entrepreneurial and organizational skills for their further objectives in life.
